title: Windows: Organize Your Browsing
drDigitalIntro: Windows are separate Safari experiences. Each window can have its own tabs. You might open one window for shopping and another for work — they're completely separate. Create a new window with File > New Window or Command+N. Windows are useful when you want to keep things completely organized.

playgroundTask.question: What is the difference between tabs and windows in Safari?

options.text: Tabs are within one window; windows are entirely separate
You can only have one tab per window

drDigitalSuccess: Exactly! Tabs share a window. Windows are independent — each can have their own tabs.
drDigitalHint: Think of a window as an entire browser session, and tabs as pages within that session.
